name: PRD MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for generating and managing Product Requirements Documents (PRDs). Enables AI agents to create structured PRDs from product ideas, retrieve PRD templates, update requirement sections, and manage product documentation — supporting AI-assisted product management and technical writing workflows.
use_cases: Generating structured PRDs from product ideas with AI agents
Maintaining and updating product requirements from product management agents
Retrieving PRD templates and filling them with product specifications
Integrating PRD creation into AI-driven product planning workflows
not_for: Teams with established PRD tools (Confluence, Notion) — use those MCPs
Compliance documentation requiring formal review processes
best_when: A product manager or engineer wants AI agents to draft, structure, and manage PRDs — accelerating requirements documentation without starting from blank templates.
avoid_when: You have an established documentation system. PRD quality requires domain expertise — AI-generated PRDs need human review before acting on them.

auth.notes: Local PRD generation — no authentication required.

pricing.notes: Free open source PRD generation tool.

known_agent_gotchas: AI-generated PRDs require human review — don't ship requirements directly from AI output
PRD quality depends on product context provided to agent — richer context yields better documents
PRD templates may not match your team's specific format preferences
31 stars indicates early/niche adoption — verify maintenance activity
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local document generation. No credentials. Product ideas processed locally. Low security risk.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local generation. No credentials. Product data stays local. Low risk.
